text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We're at a festival close to summer<n>camp. Even
here, T.M. Opera O is in<n>top form.

Behold that vendor over yonder!<n>Thrusting out in a
fine display are<n>none other than legendary
chocolate<n>banana swords!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We must draw them at once and free<n>the goldfish
from their watery<n>dungeon! Let us fry noodles and
octopi while we're at it!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Mommy, Mommy! Look at her! Isn't<n>she funny?

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text: Shh! It's rude to stare.

Just as Opera O stokes her<n>enthusiasm for the
festival...
Um... Hello there!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This festival is all well and good, but I<n>was
wondering if you would like to<n>join the greatest
summer festival.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The greatest, you say? And what<n>makes it so,
Grass? Fireworks,<n>perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No, something even more impressive.

You know my classmate, El Condor<n>Pasa? Her
race overseas will be<n>broadcast there, live.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Since it's happening during camp,<n>I've been
asking everyone to watch<n>it with me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: El's race! But of course, I would<n>heartily join in!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So, the older generation is already<n>making
headway abroad... I must<n>observe it for myself!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The big race viewing party is today,<n>and everyone
is beaming with<n>excitement.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Go for it! El, El—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner is El Condor Pasa! El<n>Condor Pasa
takes first!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her splendid win proves that even in<n>Europe,
Japanese Umamusume are a<n>real force to be
reckoned with! The<n>gates to a new age are open!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Magnificent... Just... Aaahh, what<n>splendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For a Japanese Umamusume to shine<n>so brightly
in France, one of the great<n>nations of opera!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You were rooting for El, weren't you,<n>Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Rooting? Hardly! I am the one who<n>soon will
outpace and conquer the<n>previous generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am merely happy to see those who<n>thrived last
year continue to grow<n>stronger.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The stronger my adversary, the more<n>valuable
their defeat! The stories of<n>their downfall shall set
passions<n>ablaze!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
After all, the star that is I shines most<n>brilliantly
when opposed by a<n>consummate foe.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ambitious, aren't you? El and I won't<n>lose, just
so you know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Me neither! El beat me in last year's<n>Japan Cup,
but things will be different<n>this time!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just what I wished to hear! However,<n>you'd best
steel thyselves first for<n>the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Consider it my first official clash<n>against the two
of you, if you so<n>desire!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Challenge accepted.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, they promise to face each<n>other at the end
of the year.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as how we are already here<n>and together,
and I can hardly wait for<n>the main act...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why not have a showdown, as a<n>rehearsal of
sorts, during our summer<n>camp excursion?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like a fine idea to me. It<n>will be a nice
change from our usual<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I hope your trainer has no objections.
choice_data_list: Of course not. Don't hold back.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is skilled enough to<n>handle anything
that comes up.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
No matter what kind of special training<n>it is, I want
her to go all out.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right, Opera O. Who would you like<n>to
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! We're both pretty tough! Who<n>will it be?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I shall defer judgment to the<n>one whom I
trust more than any<n>other.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, who do you think would<n>provide the better
challenge?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week is known for her speed<n>and power.
She can overtake anyone<n>in a quick burst.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As for Grass Wonder, I've heard she<n>has the
heart of a fighter and thrives<n>on competition.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The best one for T.M. Opera O to<n>compete against
is...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You picked me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right! We'll face off tomorrow<n>instead of our
normal training!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hope you're ready to work at the<n>beach house
together, Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Putting up beach umbrellas, carrying<n>boats...
Whoever makes more people<n>smile wins!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! You can carry those<n>hulking boats with
your bare hands?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You'd never make it in Hokkaido if<n>you couldn't
lift a tractor out of a<n>ditch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Good luck trying to beat us if you<n>can't even lift a
little boat!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have left me in awe of Hokkaido.<n>It is truly the
kingdom of bogs and<n>hearty root vegetables!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very well! I accept this travail you've<n>proposed,
and I shall emerge<n>victorious! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O works up a sweat, refusing<n>to lose to
Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She manages to learn a bit about<n>work and social
responsibility while<n>also building up her strength.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You chose me, and I accept. ♪ But<n>just the two of
us running kind of<n>lacks performative flair...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How about we do something to go<n>hand in hand
with summer camp? For<n>instance...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The warm breeze carries the sound<n>of cicadas
buzzing.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I challenge you to write haiku poetry<n>under the hot,
summer sun. Can you<n>compose a poem while
enduring the<n>intense heat?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Composing verse in this<n>wretched heat?
How barbaric this<n>open-air stage is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
An opera of torture! Is this the power<n>of my
predecessors?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I'll go first.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
By summer winds swept Till risen to<n>nirvana My
mind will soon be

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Now, your turn.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ngh... too hot... to think...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, this sweltering oblivion is<n>becoming a
fresh source of<n>inspiration!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you Overlord Endure you must,<n>Overlord You
are beautiful

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: No seasonal words, huh?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Summer, Overlord ...Will make you<n>sweat, Overlord
You are beautiful

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While Opera O's take on haiku is<n>certainly unique,
it seems Grass<n>Wonder's challenge has given
her a<n>boost in guts.
